target_area.description: Discussion paragraph 'Contracts before deltas' and adjacent limitations/conclusion flow

change_summary: Reframed the GRScenes stress result as the clearest warning that proxy similarity is not enough.
Added a close-image/scoring-contract contrast to make the paragraph read like a discussion takeaway rather than a table recap.
Changed 'contract finding' to 'contract evidence' while preserving the boundary against model ranking.
Kept coordinate frames and parser coverage as frozen prerequisites so the page 9 flow remains stable.

observations: Before: page 9 Contracts paragraph rendered 'proxy-similar ren-' followed by 'ders' and 'contract find-' followed by 'ing'.
After: the accepted wording removes those old splits and frames the stress result as a warning about proxy similarity and scoring contracts.
After: 'Limitations' remains at the top of the right column, and 'Conclusion' remains in the lower left column.
After: Figure 4, Ethical Considerations, and References remain on page 10 with stable structure.
Rejected: a Related Work opening rewrite reduced some old page 3 splits but introduced worse breaks and was restored.
Rejected: a shorter Discussion version moved the Limitations heading to the bottom of page 9 left column, so the accepted version restores the longer frozen-coordinate prerequisite sentence.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; no violations or unsafe figure violations.
